title: Decadent Venezuelan Walnut Empanadas
description: Indulgent Venezuelan dish featuring walnuts, with earthy and crispy flavors, cooked on a salt block for a unique experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, and turmeric.
Add the melted butter, egg, and water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of chopped walnuts in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the walnuts to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Place the empanadas on a preheated salt block and cook for 10 minutes on each side.
Serve the empanadas warm and enjoy.
